name: ラーメンを食べる。
overview: ‘Eating Ramen’ is a programme that offers an intimate look into the daily life of a popular ramen shop where queues are a given. The camera follows the action relentlessly, from the early morning preparations right through to closing time. What insights does this reveal into the passion the owner pours into his ramen? And finally, a celebrity ramen enthusiast silently savours every last bite of this exquisite bowl, brimming with the owner’s dedication! It is a ramen documentary made for ramen lovers.
